apps.name: Gitea (Code & Git)
apps.description: Self-hosted Git service with issue tracking, pull requests, and code review
apps.cli_connect: docker exec pg-gitea psql -U agent_rw -d gitea
apps.cli_command: docker exec pg-gitea psql -U agent_rw -d gitea -c

apps.name: Wiki.js (Knowledge Base)
apps.description: Modern wiki engine with markdown support, tagging, and page hierarchy
apps.cli_connect: docker exec pg-wiki psql -U agent_rw -d wikijs
apps.cli_command: docker exec pg-wiki psql -U agent_rw -d wikijs -c

apps.name: Mattermost (Team Chat)
apps.description: Open-source team messaging with channels, direct messages, and integrations
apps.cli_connect: docker exec pg-mattermost psql -U agent_rw -d mattermost
apps.cli_command: docker exec pg-mattermost psql -U agent_rw -d mattermost -c
